```{r visualization}
#     geom_point(size = 2) +
#     geom_hline(
#       yintercept = mean(mc_summary$overall$mean_arr_delay),
#       linetype = "dashed", color = "red"
#     ) +
#     geom_ribbon(
#       aes(ymin = mc_summary$confidence_intervals$mean_arr_delay_lower,
#           ymax = mc_summary$confidence_intervals$mean_arr_delay_upper),
#       alpha = 0.2, fill = "red"
#     ) +
#     labs(
#       title = "Monte Carlo Convergence: Mean Arrival Delay",
#       x = "Replication",
#       y = "Mean Arrival Delay (minutes)"
#     ) +
#     theme_minimal()
# }
# 
# # Plot delay distribution comparison
# plot_delay_distribution <- function(sim_results) {
#   sim_results |>
#     mutate(
#       carrier_type = if_else(airline %in% c("UAL", "DAL", "AAL", "ASA"),
#                              "Hub-and-Spoke", "Point-to-Point")
#     ) |>
#     ggplot(aes(x = arr_delay, fill = carrier_type)) +
#     geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
#     geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
#     geom_vline(xintercept = 15, linetype = "dotted", color = "red") +
#     scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-30, 120)) +
#     labs(
#       title = "Arrival Delay Distribution by Carrier Type",
#       x = "Arrival Delay (minutes)",
#       y = "Density",
#       fill = "Carrier Type"
#     ) +
#     theme_minimal()
# }
# 
# # Plot airport delay heatmap
# plot_airport_heatmap <- function(sim_results, top_n = 20) {
#   airport_delays <- sim_results |>
#     group_by(departure) |>
#     summarise(
#       mean_dep_delay = mean(dep_delay),
#       n_flights = n(),
#       .groups = "drop"
#     ) |>
#     arrange(desc(n_flights)) |>
#     slice_head(n = top_n)
#   
#   airport_order <- airport_delays$departure
#   
#   hourly_delays <- sim_results |>
#     filter(departure %in% airport_order) |>
#     mutate(
#       hour = floor((sched_dep_min %% 1440) / 60),
#       departure = factor(departure, levels = airport_order)
#     ) |>
#     group_by(departure, hour) |>
#     summarise(mean_delay = mean(dep_delay), .groups = "drop")
#   
#   ggplot(hourly_delays, aes(x = hour, y = departure, fill = mean_delay)) +
#     geom_tile() +
#     scale_fill_gradient2(
#       low = "darkgreen", mid = "yellow", high = "red",
#       midpoint = 15, name = "Mean\nDelay"
#     ) +
#     scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 23, 3)) +
#     labs(
#       title = "Departure Delays by Airport and Hour",
#       x = "Hour of Day",
#       y = "Airport"
#     ) +
#     theme_minimal()
# }
# 
# # Sensitivity analysis plots
# plot_sensitivity <- function(sensitivity_results) {
#   bind_rows(
#     sensitivity_results$carrier_delay |> mutate(param = "Carrier Delay Prob"),
#     sensitivity_results$nas_delay |> mutate(param = "NAS Delay Prob"),
#     sensitivity_results$capacity |> mutate(param = "Capacity Factor")
#   ) |>
#     ggplot(aes(x = param_value, y = mean_arr_delay)) +
#     geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
#     geom_point(size = 3) +
#     facet_wrap(~param, scales = "free_x") +
#     labs(
#       title = "Sensitivity Analysis: Effect on Mean Arrival Delay",
#       x = "Parameter Value",
#       y = "Mean Arrival Delay (minutes)"
#     ) +
#     theme_minimal()
# }
```

## Running the Simulation

```{r run-example, eval=FALSE}
# # Load your schedule data
# schedule <- readRDS("hub_spoke_schedule.rds") |>
#   bind_rows(readRDS("point_to_point_schedule.rds"))
# 
# # Classify airports
# airport_info <- classify_airports(schedule)
# 
# # Baseline simulation (no weather disruption)
# cat("Running baseline simulation...\n")
# baseline_results <- run_monte_carlo(
#   schedule, airport_info, 
#   weather_events = list(),
#   n_replications = 30,
#   parallel = TRUE
# )
# 
# baseline_summary <- summarize_monte_carlo(baseline_results)
# print(baseline_summary$confidence_intervals)
# 
# # Weather scenario: Thunderstorms at major hubs
# cat("\nRunning weather disruption scenario...\n")
# weather_scenario <- list(
#   create_weather_scenario(
#     "thunderstorms",
#     affected_airports = c("KATL", "KORD", "KDFW"),
#     start_hour = 14,
#     duration_hours = 4,
#     intensity = 1.2
#   )
# )
# 
# weather_results <- run_monte_carlo(
#   schedule, airport_info,
#   weather_events = weather_scenario,
#   n_replications = 30,
#   parallel = TRUE
# )
# 
# weather_summary <- summarize_monte_carlo(weather_results)
# 
# # Compare scenarios
# comparison <- tibble(
#   Scenario = c("Baseline", "Thunderstorms"),
#   `Mean Delay` = c(
#     baseline_summary$confidence_intervals$mean_arr_delay_mean,
#     weather_summary$confidence_intervals$mean_arr_delay_mean
#   ),
#   `% Delayed 15+` = c(
#     baseline_summary$confidence_intervals$pct_delayed_15_mean,
#     weather_summary$confidence_intervals$pct_delayed_15_mean
#   ),
#   `Propagation Share` = c(
#     baseline_summary$confidence_intervals$prop_delay_share_mean,
#     weather_summary$confidence_intervals$prop_delay_share_mean
#   )
# )
# 
# print(comparison)
# 
# # Visualizations
# plot_delay_sources(baseline_results |> filter(replication == 1))
# plot_delay_distribution(baseline_results |> filter(replication == 1))
# plot_airport_heatmap(baseline_results |> filter(replication == 1))
# 
# # Sensitivity analysis
# cat("\nRunning sensitivity analysis...\n")
# sensitivity <- run_sensitivity_analysis(
#   schedule |> sample_frac(0.2),  # Use subset for speed
#   airport_info,
#   n_reps = 5
# )
# plot_sensitivity(sensitivity)
```

### Key Improvements Over Original Simulation

Airport capacity - Queue-based with hourly limits
Delay sources - 5 distinct sources with fitted distributions
Weather - Full scenario system with capacity impacts
Turnaround - Gamma-distributed by carrier/location type
Passenger connections - Misconnection analysis
Statistical validity - Monte Carlo with confidence intervals
Validation - Framework for comparing to observed data
Sensitivity - Multi-parameter analysis

## References
